events.description: 吳王濞、楚王戊等七國同日起兵西向，景帝誅晁錯以謝之，卒賴竇嬰、周亞夫之力而平
events.name: Seven Kingdoms Rebellion

events.description: 吳楚七國連兵反，膠西、膠東、菑川、濟南皆應，齊獨守不下
events.name: Seven Kings Uprising

events.description: 密康公從穆王游涇上，有三女奔之，其母戒以必致於王，康公不獻，一年而密亡
events.name: Three Women Flee to Duke Kang of Mi

events.description: 周公為武王病設三壇共一墠，卜以祈福
events.name: Three Altars Shared on One Altar-platform

events.description: 密康公不獻三女於王，卒致密亡
events.name: Fall of the State of Mi

events.description: 衛青三子伉、不疑、登同日受封，人以為榮
events.name: Three of Wei Qing's Sons Ennobled on Same Day

events.description: 太史公記漢武帝立皇子閎、旦、胥為王之事，及王夫人問策、燕王廣陵王終始之跡
events.name: Three King Sons' Household Records

events.description: 策命三王，各有申誡，齊戒慎內，燕戒無怨德，廣陵戒慎外不作威福
events.name: Admonitions to Three Kings

events.description: 鄉飲酒禮中，賓主於階前三度相讓之儀，象徵月亮三日成魄，寓意建國立三卿
events.name: Three Postponements at the Steps

events.description: 辭讓封爵，三辭而後受，古之義也
events.name: Three-fold Declination of a Fief

events.description: 聚而爭利者，不知大患之將至；苟安目前，必有後患
events.name: Three Louse Fable

events.description: 三年考績，三考則賞罰明焉
events.name: Three Inspections for Demotion and Promotion

events.description: 官長書功，公親見賢，察驗而授官，選拔基層人才之制
events.name: Three Selections

events.description: 士會進諫，退而待命，三至簷下乃蒙見察
events.name: Three Advancements Until the Eaves

events.description: 主人、主婦、賓長依次酌酒獻尸之禮，達敬於死者

events.description: 王行受同之禮，三宿升降，三祭酒茅，三咤而退

events.description: 葬後三日，行三次虞祭以安神
events.name: Three-fold Sacrifice After Burial

events.description: 奔喪之禮，三日而成服，五哭而事畢
events.name: Three-fold Mourning with Cloths

events.description: 類非而是，類是而非；字形相近，傳聞易誤
events.name: Three Pigs Crossing the River

events.description: 三年以為隆，緦小功以為殺，期九月以為間，隆殺有差
events.name: Three Three-year Mourning Periods

events.description: 天子視學所設之席位，以貴老敬賢
events.name: Three Elders and Five Veterans

events.description: 叔向論三人同犯鬻獄之罪，生者當誅，死者當戮
events.name: Discussion of Three Evils

events.description: 顏回持仁之恒
events.name: Three-month Steadfastness in Benevolence

events.description: 上官大夫因爭寵而害屈平之能，讒言於懷王，王怒疏之
events.name: Slandering of Qu Yuan by Shangguan

events.description: 上元夫人嘗降漢宮以誡武帝，總統真籍，位亞金母
events.name: Wu Di's Encounter with Shangyuan Furen

events.description: 有獻不死之藥於荆王者，客言王殺臣，乃死藥也，以為客欺王
events.name: Gift of the Elixir of Immortality

events.description: 晉國酤者以狗不去則酒酸，喻姦臣不去終無以售

events.description: 桓公身死蟲出而不收，以不終用賢也

events.description: 莊公失德，不能承先世之業
events.name: Duke Zhuang's Failure to Continue Ancestral Cause

events.description: 且蘭君恐遠行而反，漢誅之遂平南夷置牂柯郡

events.description: 文王之德光顯昭融，萬民承奉無厭

events.description: 世與道交相喪，離道之世無以興道

articles: 不道仁義者故不聽學者之言

events.description: 顏回好學，不遷怒不貳過

events.description: 不召而至之客，以敬待之終得其助

events.description: 世俗愚學不達治亂之情，以先古之書亂當世之治

events.description: 狄人內侵邊境不寧

events.description: 諸侯九會而有常，大命出焉，以定邦交之節
events.name: Nine Assemblies of Feudal Lords

events.description: 夏衰之世，二龍止於王庭，卜藏其漦以傳後世
events.name: Fall of Xia, Rise of Yin

events.description: 景公夢見五人稱冤，晏子知為昔日獵殺之五丈夫
events.name: Duke Jing's Five Men Dream

events.description: 吳起仕魏，變法强兵，功業有成
events.name: Wu Qi's Reforms in Wei

events.name: Shang Yang's Reforms in Qin

events.description: 魏室五公子爭立，內亂不休
events.name: Wei Succession Crisis

events.description: 滕世子居廬五月，儀容哭泣之哀，弔者悅服
events.name: Teng Heir Mourning Period

events.description: 欒大佩六印貴振天下，後以妄言無驗被誅
events.name: Luan Da's Rise and Fall

events.description: 五年之間號令三變，自古未有其速
events.name: Five Orders Changing Three Times in Five Years

events.description: 五伯但知鄉方略畜積修闘，以詐心依仁取勝，非王道也
events.name: Spring and Autumn Period Hegemony

events.description: 冬至夏至陰陽迭用，若乖其度則天見咎徵

events.description: 田橫居海島中，聞橫死，五百人皆自殺
events.name: Tian Heng's Death and the Mass Suicide of His Followers

events.description: 公劉卜宅於京，依之以立朝廷序宗族
events.name: Gong Liu Establishes Capital at Jing

events.description: 宋萬弒閔公，仇牧遇之於門，批而殺之

events.description: 重耳避驪姬之難，流亡十九年，終歸國而立為君

events.description: 呂后斷戚夫人手足，去眼煇耳，飲瘖藥，使居廁中，命曰人彘

events.description: 周宣王即位，撥亂反正，仍叔作詩美之

events.description: 整備六軍以為邦國之衞

events.description: 紀夏五月之月令，兼樂師整備、君子齋戒之節

events.description: 孟春命樂正入學習舞，仲春上丁命樂正習舞釋菜，季春之末大合樂

events.description: 仲春行秋令則大水寒氣揔至，行冬令則陽氣不勝，行夏令則大旱蟲螟
events.name: Zhongchun Violating Autumn Ordinance

events.description: 孟夏行冬令，則寒氣不效，災禍立至
events.name: Zhongxia Violating Winter Ordinance

events.description: 仲秋行春令則秋雨不降草木生榮，行夏令則蟄蟲不藏，行冬令則風災數起
events.name: Zhongqiu Violating Spring Ordinance

events.description: 料民於太原乃示少惡事，必招諸侯之避
events.name: Zhongshan Fu Advising King Xuan to Count the People

events.description: 仲山父以為立少不宜於教民
events.name: Zhongshan Fu Advising King Xuan Against Establishing Heir

events.description: 臺榭之美在民無害，不在土木之崇高；君茍以為美而為之正，楚其殆矣
events.name: Wu Jubo Discussing the Beauty of Towers and Chu Being in Peril

events.description: 吳子以蔡師及楚人戰于伯莒，楚師敗績，遂入郢

events.description: 文王伐崇國之城，滅之以定天下也

events.description: 宋衛入鄭，蔡人怒而不和

events.description: 矜伐好專，舉事之禍也。聖人持滿，與天合德

events.description: 越王滅吳，誅太宰伯嚭，以為不忠

articles: 作事者必於東南收功實者常於西北
